title: Counter Mine 2 - Optional Mod Pack
description: A modpack containing useful mods for a better gameplay experience on the CherryPizza server.
body:
# 🍒 CherryPizza Mod Pack

A lightweight modpack designed for the **CherryPizza** server that improves performance, visuals, and communication while keeping the gameplay completely vanilla.

The pack installs a set of carefully selected client-side mods and a preset of recommended game settings so you can jump into the server with the best experience right away.

## ✨ Features

### ⚡ Better Performance
- **Sodium** — significantly improves FPS and overall game performance.

### 🎙️ Built-in Voice Chat
- **Simple Voice Chat** — proximity voice chat supported by the server.

### 🔍 Better Combat Experience
- **ZoomSensitivityFix** — fixes mouse sensitivity when using scoped weapons.

### 🎨 Improved Visuals
- **ReShaded Resource Pack** — enhanced visuals without losing performance.
- **Sodium Core Shader Support** — enables shader support required for the resource pack.

### ⚙️ Optimized Game Settings
- Includes a preset of recommended settings for the best gameplay experience on the server.

## 🔗 Server

Play on the server or learn more here:  
https://modrinth.com/server/cherrypizza
